name: happy-path-variant-b
task: Create a sortable data table widget for displaying financial statement line items (e.g., rows of revenue, COGS, gross profit across multiple quarters). Columns should be sortable on click.
assertions: Table header cells use 11px font size with uppercase text-transform and letter-spacing between 0.04em and 0.06em
The component uses the interactions.sort property from the WidgetPayload to determine if sorting is enabled
Data cells containing numbers use var(--font-mono) or a JetBrains Mono font-family declaration
The widget background uses var(--bg-secondary) or the equivalent surface color CSS variable (#111318)
Response includes registration of the new widget type in the widget type-to-component map or explicitly notes where to add it
